node.text: Most devices here use the standard adapter setup; distribution is easier that way.
Notice: the shuttle route will use a temporary vehicle from 17 - 22 March 2026.
Notice: the shuttle route will use a temporary vehicle from 17 - 22 March 2026.
We saw the same thing earlier, but it cleared up and looks fine now.
That clip fits into the waffle maker easily.
Wrapped up here, heading over now @team.
